raw_text: muhammet ikbal elek muhammet.elek@gmail.com e +905354017079 e muhammetikbal/ am 26 years old. love space, aviation and the latest technological products since my childhood and follow them with curiosity. can express my life motto as "curious enough". during my university years, established a robotic club and participated in many national and international competitions and received degrees. the most important of these was cansat competition, organized by nasa and lockheed martin. had a global experience. in line with my dreams, am at the moment softtech, one of the largest software companies in turkey. we work hard to make turkey's first flying car. want to contribute to the developing technology throughout my career. professional experience 09/2019 technical business developer, softtech - aircar 2 istanbul, turkey day-to-day flying car market monitoring, analysis and benchmarking preparing and presenting pitching decks searching for investments and managing investor relations identifying new business models and creating opportunities for them resource, time and cost planning ultimately leading to the creation of project budgets technical coordination with suppliers and producers to ensure development, design, qualification, and manufacturing efforts support the aircraft production schedule creating website & social media contents calculating and sizing new use cases for the aircar to provide a basis for future decisions for the management team assisting in the preparation of management presentations and meetings for investors, the management team, and partners coordinating and preparing documents to assist in decision-making for the general manager education 09/2014 - 07/2020 bachelor of science: electronics engineering, gebze technical university 2 09/2020 master of science: strategy and innovation, gebze technical university 3 skills ms office solution-oriented innovative team player pioneer spirit leadership interests scuba diving 7 (i'm cmas 2 star professional diver. in 2015, managed to make many people love underwater by establishing a underwater sports club at my university.) latin dances (/ love salsa and bachata and attending latin nights) camping (sometimes like to get away from technology, stay alone with nature and appreciate what we have once again.) 06/2018 06/2019 06/2020 11/2016 05/2018 awards cansat competition finalist, american astronautical society, nasa 72 built the gtu-sat 7 space team to build unmanned aerial and land vehicles, model satellites, rockets and various robots. have been a founding team leader since 2017. in the cansat competition held under the sponsorship of nasa in 2018, the team named with gtu-sat became the 8th in the world and the 1st in turkey in the pdr stage. we completed the competition in which we competed in the us state of texas in 31st place in the general classification. cansat competition finalist, american astronautical society, nasa usa texas cansat competition finalist, american astronautical society, nasa usa virginia - launch canceled due to pandemic issues. organisations underwater cleaning association, volunteer diver 2 since 2016, have been voluntarily participating in many coastal and sea cleaning activities and aim to raise awareness. gtu robotic and automation club, robotics instructor try to transfer new technologies to young people by giving free robotics lessons to primary, high school and university students. references fuad aliew, assoc. prof dr, gebze technical university faliew@gtu.edu.tr
